## Workflow

```
/backlog → /plan → /plan-review → [clear context] → /plan-approved → /plan-check → /pr → /review → /address-pr → /finish
```

**Branch flow**: `feat/feature-name → {staging_branch} → main`

- Feature branches always target `{staging_branch}` (staging)
- `{staging_branch} → main` happens via PR after QA
- Direct pushes to `main` are blocked by hooks

## Testing Rules

<!-- Generated by /start based on detected stack -->

## BLUEPRINT Workspace

```
blueprint/
├── backlog/     ← ideas not yet planned       (/backlog)
├── live/        ← currently in development     (/plan)
├── upstream/    ← shipped and merged           (/finish)
└── expired/     ← cancelled or deferred        (/backlog --archive)
```

Files move between folders automatically on each phase transition.

## Commits

Format: `<emoji> <type>[(<scope>)][!]: <description>` (present tense, lowercase)

```
✨ feat: add payment processing
✨ feat(auth): add OAuth provider
💥 feat!: rename workspace folder
🐛 fix: resolve duplicate email validation
🧪 test: add coverage for order service
🔄 ci: add release workflow
↩️ revert: undo broken audit rule
📋 plan: update auth blueprint tasks
```

**Never** add AI signatures (`Co-Authored-By`, `Generated by`, etc.)

## Updates

Run `blueprint update` to pull the latest hooks, skills, and templates.
